summary: The accused allegedly prepared ginger paste in unhygienic conditions using spoiled raw material and chemicals

title: 26 injured as fire breaks out at electric meter factory in Noida
summary: The injured were among nearly 240 workers who were trapped inside the factory, Capital Power System Limited, in the Phase 1 police station area when the fire broke out

title: Curfew relaxed in Meghalaya's East Garo Hills for five hours on March 12
summary: East Garo Hills Deputy Commissioner R P Marak said the relaxation was allowed to enable residents to procure essential commodities, while security forces continued to maintain vigil in sensitive areas.

title: Belagavi prison guard found dead
summary: Jail officials said that he was upset at not being able to find a bride
